name: AutoOffice
description: 多格式自动化报告生成平台（PPT、PDF、Word、LaTeX、LaTeX-PDF、HTML），含去AI化、摘要、RAG 增强、质量分析

requirements.need: 从结构化 JSON 数据生成多格式报告
requirements.approach: Handlebars 模板 + 格式专用适配器，纯 Node.js/TypeScript 管线（PPT: PptxGenJS, Word: docx, PDF: Playwright）

features.name: PPT 生成
behavior: 纯 Node.js 生成 PPTX，无 Python 依赖
7 套主题（academic/business/minimal/nord/tech/warm/slate）
支持标题页、内容页、图表 PNG 嵌入
生成时间 ~48ms
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: PDF 生成
behavior: TypeScript 生成专业排版 HTML + Playwright 渲染为 PDF
7 套主题（academic/business/minimal/elegant/technical-report/news-digest/study-notes），含封面、目录、页眉页脚
技术报告、新闻摘要、学习笔记总结三类专用 PDF 模板支持中文字体嵌入、表格、代码块、引用块
目录页提供章节内链，章节末尾提供弱视觉返回总述按钮
冷启动 ~1.1s（含 Chromium 启动），热模式 ~0.58s
浏览器池复用，无 Python 依赖
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: Word 生成
behavior: 纯 Node.js/TypeScript 生成 DOCX，无 Python 依赖
3 套主题（academic/business/minimal）
支持表格、图片、页眉页脚、目录
生成时间 ~70ms
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: HTML 生成
behavior: 纯 Node 渲染，无外部依赖
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: LaTeX 生成
behavior: 生成 .tex 源文件
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: LaTeX-PDF 编译
behavior: xelatex 编译学术论文 PDF（需 TeX Live）
内置 5 套模板：article / report / beamer / cvpr / uestc-thesis
CVPR 投稿格式（双栏、10pt、letterpaper）
电子科技大学学士毕业论文格式（中英文切换）
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 去AI化处理
behavior: 规则化去除生成文本中的 AI 腔调（deai.ts）
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: 内容处理能力：摘要、RAG 增强、质量分析
requirements.approach: HTTP API + CLI 命令，路由到 KnowLever/LLMWiki 等后端服务

features.name: 摘要（summarize）
behavior: 解析内容、生成 Mermaid 架构图、智能路由到 LLMWiki/KnowLever
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: RAG 增强（enrich）
behavior: 从 KnowLever 知识库检索相关上下文补充文档
灰度：AUTOOFFICE_KNOWLEVERAGE_SEARCH_V2=on + AUTOOFFICE_KNOWLEVERAGE_TOPIC=<topic> 时 queryRAG 优先走 KnowLever /api/search/v2（转译+混合召回），HTTP 失败自动回退 v1 subprocess；默认 off 零行为变化
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)
2026-07-13: vitest tests/knowleverage-v2.test.ts 3 用例（开关判定/v2 命中拼装上下文/HTTP 失败回退 v1）+ 既有 knowleverage-config 3 用例全部通过

features.name: 质量分析（quality）
behavior: 去AI检测、单调性评分、多样性分析，返回 A-F 等级
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 批量生成（batch）
behavior: 同一数据同时生成多种格式
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 模板画廊（templates）
behavior: 6 套内置模板 + 用户自定义模板
用户通过 POST /api/templates 提交自定义模板（id/name/source/format）
自定义模板持久化到 ~/.autooffice/templates/，支持 CRUD
模板补充通道：用户描述需求（如'中国药科大学学士论文模板 LaTeX'）→ digist 搜索下载 → AutoOffice 拆解为资源文件+Skill
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.approach: Mermaid CLI (mmdc) 渲染流程图/架构图为 PNG/SVG，自动嵌入 PPT/PDF/Word/LaTeX 各格式文档

features.name: Mermaid 渲染
behavior: 4 种主题（default/dark/forest/neutral）
Playwright 渲染 Mermaid HTML 为 PNG
源码回退：无 Chromium 环境时输出文本摘要
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 图表嵌入
behavior: 自动嵌入渲染结果到 PPT/PDF/Word/LaTeX 文档
多格式适配（PptxDeckPayload/PdfReportPayload/DocxReportPayload/LatexReportPayload）
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: HTTP API 服务与外部工具集成
requirements.approach: Express HTTP 服务器暴露所有生成/摘要/RAG/质量分析能力为 REST API，集成 KnowLever/LLMWiki/OfficeCLI 等外部工具

features.name: HTTP API 服务
behavior: 统一 REST API 入口
HTML 净化（DOMPurify）
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 外部工具检测
behavior: 自动检测 OfficeCLI/LibreOffice/Pandoc 等外部工具可用性
服务环境 PATH 不完整时使用 ~/.local/bin、/opt/homebrew/bin、/Applications/LibreOffice.app 等绝对路径候选进行探测
2026-04-28 验证 SOTAgent 重启后的 /health 中 OfficeCLI、LibreOffice、Pandoc 均为 ok
生成工具摘要供报告参考
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: PolarClaw Pilot Adapter
behavior: 错误路径（API 5xx、CLI 非 0、theme 校验失败）自动写入 lobster-events.jsonl
事件 schema 对齐 SOTAgent 统一定义：{ts, type, source_project, target_project?, severity, payload, dedup_key}
status adapter 返回项目版本、运行时间、最近事件摘要
health adapter 返回错误计数和最近错误详情
test adapter 通过 vitest 运行 lobster 测试子集
过渡期使用本地 JSONL 传输，SOTAgent 事件总线就绪后可切换 HTTP POST
60 秒内同 dedup_key 事件自动去重
JSONL 超 5MB 自动轮换
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: AI 驱动 PPT 生成（Presenton 集成）
requirements.approach: 集成 Presenton（Apache 2.0 开源）作为 AI PPT 引擎，Docker 部署，通过 llama.cpp 调用本地 LLM

features.name: AI PPT 生成
behavior: Prompt → LLM Proxy 生成结构化内容 → PptxGenJS 渲染 → 可编辑 .pptx
默认通过 PolarPrivate LLM Proxy（CodingPlan/DashScope），自动注入 API Key
支持 ?backend=presenton 回退到 Presenton Docker
内置去AI化处理（stripAiFlavorDeep）
7 套主题可选，4 种语气模式
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: Presenton 健康检查
behavior: 检测 Presenton Docker 容器运行状态
返回健康/异常状态信息
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.approach: PolarPrivate L101/L100（Ollama VLM 经 :12790 转发）；不暴露具体模型名

tech.PolarPrivate: L101 默认视觉 / L100 升级
tech.Ollama: 服务端映射（OLLAMA_MODEL_L101 等 env）

features.name: 视觉 QA
behavior: 接收 base64 PNG 截图，返回 5 维度评分（排版/留白/配色/字体/信息密度）
视觉质检固定 L101（VLM）；文本 L000/L100
返回 opaque L 代码、backend、A-F 等级、问题与改进建议
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: VLM 健康检查
behavior: 探测 PolarPrivate 与本地 L-tier，返回 preferred 与 L 代码
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: 运行时统一由 PolarProcess 与 PolarPort 治理
requirements.approach: PolarProcess service autooffice 是 API 唯一生命周期权威；PolarPort 是 3900 唯一端口权威；Start/start.sh 只以前台命令运行。两个既有 cron 保持独立且不参与 API 切换。

baseline.governance_audit: drift=1: Start scripts contain direct background/kill process control
baseline.live_api: autooffice PID 25503 on 3900, healthy, detached by nohup with PPID 1
baseline.polarport: preferred reservation and sole active owner AutoOffice/autooffice:3900 already canonical
baseline.polarpilot_boundary: AutoOffice is the sole monitored project and remains dormant observer-only
baseline.verification: build-first baseline: 48 files / 384 tests passed; TypeScript build passed

behavior: Only PolarProcess may start, stop or restart service autooffice
Only PolarPort may allocate required port 3900
Start/start.sh validates authorities and build artifacts before foreground Node 22 exec
Production serve requires POLAR_RUNTIME_MANAGED=1 and PORT=3900
AUTOOFFICE_DIRECT_PORT is accepted only in NODE_ENV=test for terminating integration tests
autooffice-auto-evolve and autooffice-sota-radar registrations are not mutated
evidence: 2026-07-16: runtime governance design and implementation plan added
2026-07-16: managed-port guard, foreground launcher, staged registration and exact clients tested
2026-07-16: full suite grew to 50 files / 394 tests and TypeScript build passed
2026-07-17: precise autooffice restart replaced detached PID 25503 with governed Node 22 PID 79249
2026-07-17: one 3900 listener and canonical AutoOffice/autooffice owner verified; full health status ok
2026-07-17: protected cron snapshots remained byte-equivalent by normalized hashes 73c37c3b and bb55a7f7
2026-07-17: fresh completion gate passed: 50 files / 394 tests, TypeScript build, compliant audit, runtime uniqueness, cron integrity and observer config boundary
2026-07-17: PolarPilot synchronous status read timed out on 377k pending events; its health recovered with projects_monitored=1 and AutoOffice still has no daemon-config.json

service_management.notes: SOTA Radar: PolarProcess cron `autooffice-sota-radar` Mon 09:00 → reports/sota-radar-*.md (read-only). Auto-Evolve: PolarProcess cron `autooffice-auto-evolve` every 3d 04:00 — QA-gated minor/patch npm upgrades via Agent_core/scripts/auto-evolve.mjs; no human approval; rollback on health fail.
